case_title: PETER DALTON VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JOEL BURCHFIEL-20 FRANKLIN ST., SF CA 94102

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALTON, PETER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALTON, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY DALTON, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JOEL BURCHFIEL-20 FRANKLIN ST. SF CA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WILL AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO NAME ANOTHER DEFENDANT" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
